form.formComment: Two-year-old colt by leading sire Zoustar out of Summer Sham who was bought for AUD $ 1,400,000 (Inglis 2025 Australian Easter Yearling Sale). Runner-up in a trial at Rosehill on March 10 over 900m. Capable of a solid performance.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Equal Class FS(0). Two-year-old colt by leading sire Zoustar out of Summer Sham who was bought for AUD $ 1,400,000 (Inglis 2025 Australian Easter Yearling Sale). Runner-up in a trial at Rosehill on March 10 over 900m. Capable of a solid performance.

form.formComment: $1.7 million purchase who resumes from a spell after only one run when second last of 10 at Randwick 2yo Hcp on December 27 over 1100m, 6 len behind By Choice with 56kg at $13. Big trial winner recently so might turn things around this time in work.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Weaker Class FS(-2.5). $1.7 million purchase who resumes from a spell after only one run when second last of 10 at Randwick 2yo Hcp on December 27 over 1100m, 6 len behind By Choice with 56kg at $13. Big trial winner recently so might turn things around this time in work.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Shifted out on jumping and bumped To Dubai We Go.

form.formComment: Two-year-old colt (Snitzel - Ms Bad Behavior) who was second in a Rosehill trial over 900m April 2. Waller puts McDonald on this one over others which is a strong lead.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Equal Class FS(0). Two-year-old colt (Snitzel - Ms Bad Behavior) who was second in a Rosehill trial over 900m April 2. Waller puts McDonald on this one over others which is a strong lead.

form.formComment: First starter. Two-year-old gelding by Tagaloa out of Precocious Miss. At the most recent trial finished fifth at Warwick Farm over 795m. Looks to have the job ahead.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Equal Class FS(0). First starter. Two-year-old gelding by Tagaloa out of Precocious Miss. At the most recent trial finished fifth at Warwick Farm over 795m. Looks to have the job ahead.

form.formComment: At debut, 5th of 8 at Gosford 2yo Mdn-Sw on March 14 over 1100m, slow going 3 len behind Don't Look Back with 57kg at $21. Trialled on March 30 at Warwick Farm over 818m and finished fifth. Promising two-year-old gelding who has plenty of scope for improvement.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Stronger Class FS(4). At debut, 5th of 8 at Gosford 2yo Mdn-Sw on March 14 over 1100m, slow going 3 len behind Don't Look Back with 57kg at $21. Trialled on March 30 at Warwick Farm over 818m and finished fifth. Promising two-year-old gelding who has plenty of scope for improvement.

form.formComment: Two-year-old colt (I Am Invincible - Covent Garden) will no doubt benefit from the three trials prior to his debut today. Was second in a Canterbury barrier trial over 898m April 10. Betting the crucial element but on face value looks hard to beat.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Equal Class FS(0). Two-year-old colt (I Am Invincible - Covent Garden) will no doubt benefit from the three trials prior to his debut today. Was second in a Canterbury barrier trial over 898m April 10. Betting the crucial element but on face value looks hard to beat.

form.formComment: First starter by Snitzel out of Re Edit purchased for AUD $ 360,000 (Inglis 2025 Classic Yearling Sale). Four trials have been just fair. Looks tested in this line-up.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Equal Class FS(0). First starter by Snitzel out of Re Edit purchased for AUD $ 360,000 (Inglis 2025 Classic Yearling Sale). Four trials have been just fair. Looks tested in this line-up.

form.formComment: Third race start today. At debut, tracked the speed and boxed on steadily 5th of 8 at this track 2yo C&G Mdn on March 11 over 1000m, slow going 4 len behind The Next Episode with 58kg at $5.50. Last start 3rd of 10 at Randwick Kensington 2yo C&G Osc on March 25 over 1100m, on a slow track; 3.5 len behind Under Focus carrying 56kg at $9. Progressing well and looks good enough to play a key role.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Equal Class FS(0). Third race start today. At debut, tracked the speed and boxed on steadily 5th of 8 at this track 2yo C&G Mdn on March 11 over 1000m, slow going 4 len behind The Next Episode with 58kg at $5.50. Last start 3rd of 10 at Randwick Kensington 2yo C&G Osc on March 25 over 1100m, on a slow track; 3.5 len behind Under Focus carrying 56kg at $9. Progressing well and looks good enough to play a key role.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Shortly after the start hampered when forced wider by Satoshi.
Raced wide and without cover throughout the event.
